tests.title: should display 'Name (A to Z)' ass the default selected option
tests.fullTitle: Saucedemo UI Web Automation Product Sorting Functionality should display 'Name (A to Z)' ass the default selected option
tests.code:
let visibleSpan = await driver.findElement(By.xpath("//span[@data-test='active-option']")).getText();
expect(visibleSpan, "error tidak ada elemen").to.equal("Name (A to Z)");
